title: Echoes of Power: Reborn
description: A Palladium based addon that adds superpowers! Obtain over 45 unique powers that will shape your gameplay!
body:
Echoes of Power: Reborn is an exciting new superpowers addon for Minecraft that lets you become something more than human. Step into a world where latent potential becomes reality! Unlock extraordinary abilities, reshape your playstyle, and redefine what’s possible in your world.                       

                              
![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af428464bdfae3a038dd28e967447864fcf82119_0.webp)

This addon expands [Palladium's](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium) data system, giving players the chance to obtain, master, and customize a vast array of unique powers. From elemental manipulation to cosmic mastery, each ability feels flashy, impactful, and deeply rewarding to use.

Whether you want to storm across the battlefield, bend reality itself, or simply dominate your friends with awe-inspiring might, Echoes of Power transforms ordinary Minecraft sessions into high-octane, superhero-style adventures.

# Socials

Want to see what’s coming next for Echoes of Power?

Join my Discord for teasers, previews, and community discussions,
subscribe on YouTube for showcases and updates,
and if you’d like to support development, consider backing the addon on Patreon.

Every bit of support helps. Thank you for everything!

[![Discord_8bit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de925c943624fc406a2bc188f359f02d1a501a27.png)](https://discord.gg/2K7quhrdrr)
[![Youtube_8bit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44786305103be0276afc97aa03996167a5252969.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@pe1x1nho)
[![Patreon_8bit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0744c8d8166a7ab133cc03770922c11572b592e2.png)](https://www.patreon.com/RealGoldFish)
    
# Features
- Over 45 obtainable power - Unlock an expansive roster of abilities ranging from elemental command to unexpected cosmic prowess.
- Skill tree system - Powers have strengths, weaknesses, and unique abilities that can be unlocked to unleash your full potential.
- Awakening powers - Some powers can be awakened into even greater forms, unlocking devastating abilities and game-changing effects.
- Power Interactions & Combos - Combine powers with the Fusion Catalyst to create hybrid skills with unique effects.
- Customization - Customize how your powers look!
- Play Your Way - Use powers for combat, exploration, utility, or pure spectacle. The choice is yours.
# Abilities
![Abilities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7853bf8a876997e247c686e5a1d1f678d3ac6a3d_0.webp)

Abilities are the core of your power, accessed through a sleek, intuitive interface where raw potential becomes absolute control.

At its heart lies a branching skill tree, allowing you to unlock your abilities as you grow stronger. Each node represents a fragment of power waiting to be claimed, guiding your progression from minor enhancements to reality-defying techniques.

Every decision matters. Invest your skill points wisely to shape your character, unlock devastating effects, and tailor your powers to your playstyle. 

On the left side of the interface are Extra Abilities. A collection of quick-access utility abilities designed to make everyday gameplay smoother and more powerful.

- Instantly smelt items without a furnace
- Toggle Night Vision on demand
- Free Frost Walker
- Climb walls with high mobility
- And more!
# Customization
![Customization](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5401f0ef97add9f313eaa5d3f53d4d3a76590ca5.png)

This specialized item allows you to fine-tune specific visual traits tied to certain powers.

Currently customizable powers:

- Lycanthropy
- Hypervelocity
- Electrokinesis
- Plasma Manipulation

Create a unique aesthetic without affecting balance

# Dependencies

Palladium || Pehkui || Kubejs || Geckolib || Architectury API || Packet Fixer || Rhino || Forge Config API Port (Only needed in Fabric)
